columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident record was ingested or modified

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: Log Analytics workspace or tenant identifier

columns.name: IncidentName
columns.description: Resource name or internal GUID for the incident

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Incident title

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Incident description

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Incident severity

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Incident status

columns.name: Classification
columns.description: Incident closing classification

columns.name: ClassificationComment
columns.description: Incident closing classification comment

columns.name: ClassificationReason
columns.description: Reason for the incident classification

columns.name: Owner
columns.description: User or team assigned to the incident

columns.name: ProviderName
columns.description: Provider that generated the incident

columns.name: ProviderIncidentId
columns.description: Incident identifier assigned by the provider

columns.name: FirstActivityTime
columns.description: Timestamp of the first activity in the incident

columns.name: LastActivityTime
columns.description: Timestamp of the last activity in the incident

columns.name: FirstModifiedTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was first modified

columns.name: LastModifiedTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was last modified

columns.name: CreatedTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was created

columns.name: ClosedTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was closed

columns.name: IncidentNumber
columns.description: Sequential incident number

columns.name: RelatedAnalyticRuleIds
columns.description: Analytic rule identifiers associated with the incident

columns.name: AlertIds
columns.description: Alert identifiers associated with the incident

columns.name: BookmarkIds
columns.description: Bookmark identifiers associated with the incident

columns.name: Comments
columns.description: Incident comments

columns.name: Tasks
columns.description: Incident tasks

columns.name: Labels
columns.description: Incident labels

columns.name: IncidentUrl
columns.description: URL to open the incident in the portal

columns.name: AdditionalData
columns.description: Additional incident metadata, counts, tactics, techniques, and provider URLs

columns.name: ModifiedBy
columns.description: User or system that modified the incident

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: Source system for the incident record

columns.name: Type
columns.description: Table name emitted by the export
